## Language

<!-- Which language are you contributing? Include the BCP 47 code. e.g. "Turkish (tr)" or "Finnish (fi)" -->

## Type of contribution

<!-- Put an x in the box that applies. -->

- [ ] New language (not currently supported)
- [ ] Correction or improvement to an existing language

## If this is a correction - what needs fixing?

<!-- Which keys are wrong or unclear? Paste the current value and your suggested replacement.
     You can find all keys in locales/en.json. -->

| Key | Current value | Suggested value |
|-----|---------------|-----------------|
|     |               |                 |

## If this is a new language - are you opening a PR?

<!-- The easiest way to add a new language is to open a pull request directly.
     Copy locales/en.json, translate all values (do not change the keys), save it as
     locales/<code>.json (e.g. locales/tr.json), and open a PR using the translation
     PR template:

     https://github.com/senjinthedragon/SillyTavern-Discord-Connector/compare?template=translation.md

     If you would rather submit the translations here as text and let someone else
     create the file, that is fine too - paste the full JSON below. -->

```json
// paste your locales/<code>.json here if not submitting a PR
```
